title: 📜 Bharatiya Samvidhan (Constitution)
facts: Samvidhan 26 November 1949 ko adopt hua aur 26 January 1950 ko lagu (effective) hua.
Drafting Committee ke chairman the Dr. B.R. Ambedkar — inhe 'Samvidhan ke janak' kehte hain.
Bharat ka Samvidhan duniya ka sabse lamba likhit (written) constitution hai.
Shuruaat me ismein 395 Articles, 22 Parts aur 8 Schedules the.
Preamble (Prastavana) me 'We the People of India' likha hai — yani shakti janta ke paas hai.

quiz.question: Bharat ka Samvidhan kab lagu (effective) hua?
quiz.explanation: 26 Jan 1950 ko Samvidhan lagu hua, isi din ko Republic Day manate hain.

title: 🏞️ Bharat ki Nadiyan (Rivers)
facts: Ganga Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi hai (~2525 km), jo Gangotri se nikalti hai.
Brahmaputra Tibet se shuru hokar Bharat aur Bangladesh me behti hai.
Godavari South India (peninsular) ki sabse lambi nadi hai.
Narmada aur Tapti paschim (west) ki taraf Arabian Sea me girti hain.
Ganga aur Brahmaputra milkar duniya ka sabse bada delta — Sundarban — banati hain.

quiz.question: Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi kaun si hai?
quiz.explanation: Ganga (~2525 km) Bharat ki sabse lambi nadi hai.

title: 🪐 Saur Mandal (Solar System)
facts: Brihaspati (Jupiter) saur mandal ka sabse bada grah hai.
Budh (Mercury) Sooraj ke sabse paas hai, par sabse garam grah Shukra (Venus) hai.
Prithvi ka ek hi prakritik upgrah (satellite) hai — Chandrama.
Sooraj ek taara (star) hai, grah nahi.
Prakash (light) ki gati lagbhag 3 lakh km/second hoti hai.

quiz.question: Saur mandal ka sabse bada grah kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Brihaspati (Jupiter) saur mandal ka sabse bada grah hai.

title: 🏛️ Bharatiya Sansad (Parliament)
facts: Bharatiya Sansad ke do sadan hain: Lok Sabha aur Rajya Sabha.
Lok Sabha (lower house) ki adhiktam sankhya 552 hai.
Rajya Sabha (upper house) ki adhiktam sankhya 250 hai.
Money Bill (dhan vidheyak) sirf Lok Sabha me hi pesh ho sakta hai.
Rashtrapati (President) bhi Sansad ka ang (part) maana jaata hai.

quiz.question: Money Bill (dhan vidheyak) sabse pehle kis sadan me pesh hota hai?
quiz.explanation: Money Bill sirf Lok Sabha me hi pesh kiya ja sakta hai.

title: 🇮🇳 Rashtriya Pratik (National Symbols)
facts: Rashtriya pashu: Bengal Tiger (Bagh).
Rashtriya pakshi: Mor (Peacock).
Rashtriya phool: Kamal (Lotus).
Rashtriya ped: Bargad (Banyan tree).
Rashtriya geet 'Vande Mataram' Bankim Chandra Chattopadhyay ne likha.

quiz.question: Bharat ka rashtriya pakshi kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Mor (Peacock) Bharat ka rashtriya pakshi hai.

title: 👤 Bharat ke 'Pehle' (Firsts)
facts: Pehle Pradhan Mantri: Pandit Jawaharlal Nehru.
Pehle Rashtrapati: Dr. Rajendra Prasad.
Pehli mahila Pradhan Mantri: Indira Gandhi.
Pehle Up-Rashtrapati: Dr. S. Radhakrishnan.
Pehli mahila Rashtrapati: Pratibha Patil.

quiz.question: Bharat ke pehle Rashtrapati kaun the?
quiz.explanation: Dr. Rajendra Prasad Bharat ke pehle Rashtrapati the.

title: 🏔️ Parvat aur Chotiyan (Mountains)
facts: Mount Everest (8849 m) duniya ki sabse unchi choti hai (Nepal-China seema).
K2 duniya ki doosri sabse unchi choti hai.
Kangchenjunga Bharat ki sabse unchi choti hai (Sikkim).
Himalaya duniya ki sabse uvi (young) parvat shrinkhla hai.
Aravalli duniya ki sabse purani parvat shrinkhalaon me se ek hai (Rajasthan).

quiz.question: Duniya ki sabse unchi choti kaun si hai?
quiz.explanation: Mount Everest (8849 m) duniya ki sabse unchi choti hai.

title: 🦴 Manav Shareer (Human Body)
facts: Vyask (adult) manushya ke shareer me 206 haddiyan (bones) hoti hain.
Sabse badi haddi: Femur (jaangh ki haddi).
Sabse chhoti haddi: Stapes (kaan me).
Manushya me 4 group of blood hote hain: A, B, AB, O.
Hriday (heart) ek minute me lagbhag 72 baar dhadakta hai.

quiz.question: Vyask manushya ke shareer me kitni haddiyan hoti hain?
quiz.explanation: Vyask manushya me 206 haddiyan hoti hain (bachche me zyada hoti hain).

title: 🎖️ Swatantrata Sangram (Freedom Struggle)
facts: 1857 ka vidroh Bharat ka 'Pehla Swatantrata Sangram' kehlata hai.
Indian National Congress ki sthapna 1885 me hui.
Bharat Chhodo Andolan (Quit India) 1942 me shuru hua.
Mahatma Gandhi ne 1930 me Dandi March (Namak Satyagrah) kiya.
Bharat 15 August 1947 ko swatantra hua.

quiz.question: Bharat Chhodo Andolan (Quit India Movement) kis varsh shuru hua?
quiz.explanation: Bharat Chhodo Andolan 1942 me Mahatma Gandhi ke netritva me shuru hua.

title: 🏦 RBI aur Mudra (Currency)
facts: Reserve Bank of India (RBI) ki sthapna 1 April 1935 ko hui.
RBI ka mukhyalay (headquarters) Mumbai me hai.
Bharat ki mudra 'Rupee' hai; iska symbol ₹ 2010 me aaya.
RBI note chhapne ka kaam karta hai, par 1 rupaye ka note Finance Ministry jaari karta hai.
RBI ko 'Banker's Bank' bhi kehte hain.

quiz.question: RBI (Reserve Bank of India) ka mukhyalay kahan hai?
quiz.explanation: RBI ka mukhyalay Mumbai me hai.

title: 🏏 Khel-Kud (Sports)
facts: Cricket ka pehla World Cup 1975 me hua tha.
Bharat ne Cricket World Cup 1983 (Kapil Dev) aur 2011 (M.S. Dhoni) me jeeta.
Hockey me Bharat ne Olympics me sabse zyada gold jeete hain.
Chess ke pehle Bharatiya Grandmaster Vishwanathan Anand the.
Major Dhyan Chand 'Hockey ke Jaadugar' kehlate hain; unka janmdin (29 Aug) National Sports Day hai.

quiz.question: Bharat ne pehli baar Cricket World Cup kab jeeta?
quiz.explanation: Bharat ne 1983 me Kapil Dev ki kaptani me pehla World Cup jeeta.

title: 🌊 Vishwa Bhugol (World Geography)
facts: Prashant Mahasagar (Pacific Ocean) duniya ka sabse bada mahasagar hai.
Sahara duniya ka sabse bada garam registan (hot desert) hai.
Nile aam taur par duniya ki sabse lambi nadi maani jaati hai.
Asia duniya ka sabse bada mahadweep (continent) hai.
Russia kshetrafal (area) me duniya ka sabse bada desh hai.

quiz.question: Duniya ka sabse bada mahasagar kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Prashant Mahasagar (Pacific) duniya ka sabse bada mahasagar hai.

title: 🧪 Vigyan Basics (Science)
facts: Paani ka rasayanik sutra H2O hai.
Oxygen (O2) saans lene ke liye zaroori hai.
Common salt (namak) ka sutra NaCl hai.
Pedh-paudhe photosynthesis se CO2 lekar O2 chhodte hain.
Manushya ke khoon ka rang laal Haemoglobin (iron) ki wajah se hota hai.

quiz.question: Paani (water) ka rasayanik sutra kya hai?
quiz.explanation: Paani ka sutra H2O hai (2 hydrogen + 1 oxygen).

title: 🗺️ Bharat ke Rajya (Indian States)
facts: Kshetrafal (area) me sabse bada rajya: Rajasthan.
Aabaadi (population) me sabse bada rajya: Uttar Pradesh.
Kshetrafal me sabse chhota rajya: Goa.
Bharat me kul 28 rajya aur 8 kendra-shasit pradesh (UTs) hain.
Sabse zyada rajyon ki seema chhune wala rajya: Uttar Pradesh.

quiz.question: Kshetrafal (area) ki drishti se Bharat ka sabse bada rajya kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Rajasthan kshetrafal me Bharat ka sabse bada rajya hai.

title: 🏅 Samman aur Puraskar (Awards)
facts: Bharat Ratna desh ka sabse bada nagrik (civilian) samman hai.
Padma awards: Padma Vibhushan > Padma Bhushan > Padma Shri.
Param Vir Chakra sabse bada veerta (military, wartime) puraskar hai.
Dadasaheb Phalke Award cinema ka sabse bada samman hai.
Khel ka sabse bada samman: Major Dhyan Chand Khel Ratna.

quiz.question: Bharat ka sabse bada nagrik (civilian) samman kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Bharat Ratna desh ka sarvochch nagrik samman hai.

title: 💻 Computer Basics
facts: CPU ko computer ka 'dimaag' (brain) kehte hain.
RAM ek temporary (volatile) memory hai — bijli jaate hi data mit jata hai.
WWW (World Wide Web) ke aviष्kारak Tim Berners-Lee hain.
1 Byte = 8 Bits; 1 KB = 1024 Bytes.
Computer me sab kuch binary (0 aur 1) me hota hai.

quiz.question: Computer ka 'dimaag' (brain) kise kehte hain?
quiz.explanation: CPU (Central Processing Unit) ko computer ka dimaag kehte hain.

title: 💊 Vitamins aur Sehat
facts: Vitamin C: Amla, nimbu, santra me — rog-pratirodhak kshamata badhata hai.
Vitamin D: dhoop (sunlight) se milta hai — haddiyon ke liye zaroori.
Vitamin A: aankhon ke liye — gajar me bharpoor.
Vitamin C ki kami se 'Scurvy' rog hota hai.
Vitamin D ki kami se bachchon me 'Rickets' hota hai.

quiz.question: Haddiyon (bones) ke liye sabse zaroori vitamin kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Vitamin D haddiyon ke liye zaroori hai; ye dhoop se milta hai.

title: 💃 Shastriya Nritya (Classical Dances)
facts: Bharatanatyam: Tamil Nadu ka shastriya nritya.
Kathak: Uttar Bharat ka shastriya nritya.
Kathakali: Kerala ka prasiddh nritya.
Odissi: Odisha ka shastriya nritya.
Kuchipudi: Andhra Pradesh se sambandhit.

quiz.question: Kathakali kis rajya ka shastriya nritya hai?
quiz.explanation: Kathakali Kerala ka prasiddh shastriya nritya hai.

title: 🌍 Vishwa ki Rajdhaniyan (Capitals)
facts: Japan ki rajdhani: Tokyo.
Australia ki rajdhani: Canberra (Sydney nahi!).
Canada ki rajdhani: Ottawa.
USA ki rajdhani: Washington D.C.
United Kingdom ki rajdhani: London.

quiz.question: Australia ki rajdhani kaun si hai?
quiz.explanation: Australia ki rajdhani Canberra hai, Sydney nahi.

title: 🛰️ Antariksh (Space)
facts: Antariksh me jaane wale pehle insaan: Yuri Gagarin (Russia, 1961).
Chand par kadam rakhne wale pehle insaan: Neil Armstrong (1969, Apollo 11).
Antariksh me jaane wale pehle Bharatiya: Rakesh Sharma (1984).
ISRO (Indian Space Research Organisation) ki sthapna 1969 me hui.
ISRO ka mukhyalay Bengaluru me hai.

quiz.question: Antariksh (space) me jaane wale pehle Bharatiya kaun the?
quiz.explanation: Rakesh Sharma 1984 me antariksh me jaane wale pehle Bharatiya the.

title: 🗣️ Mashhoor Nare (Famous Slogans)
facts: 'Jai Jawan Jai Kisan': Lal Bahadur Shastri.
'Karo ya Maro': Mahatma Gandhi (Quit India, 1942).
'Inquilab Zindabad': Bhagat Singh ne lokpriya kiya.
'Tum mujhe khoon do, main tumhe azaadi dunga': Subhash Chandra Bose.
'Swaraj mera janmsiddh adhikar hai': Bal Gangadhar Tilak.

quiz.question: 'Jai Jawan Jai Kisan' ka nara kisne diya?
quiz.explanation: Ye nara Lal Bahadur Shastri ne diya tha.

title: 🕌 Taj Mahal aur Smarak
facts: Taj Mahal Agra (UP) me Yamuna nadi ke kinare hai.
Ise Mughal badshah Shah Jahan ne apni begum Mumtaz Mahal ki yaad me banwaya.
Ye safed sangmarmar (white marble) se bana hai.
Taj Mahal UNESCO World Heritage Site hai.
Ise duniya ke 7 ajoobon (New 7 Wonders) me gina jata hai.

quiz.question: Taj Mahal kisne banwaya tha?
quiz.explanation: Shah Jahan ne apni begum Mumtaz Mahal ki yaad me Taj Mahal banwaya.

title: 🌐 Sanyukt Rashtra (United Nations)
facts: UN (United Nations) ki sthapna 24 October 1945 ko hui.
UN ka mukhyalay New York (USA) me hai.
Security Council ke 5 sthayi sadasya: USA, Russia, China, UK, France.
UN ki 6 aadhikarik bhashayein hain (English, Hindi nahi).
24 October ko 'UN Day' manaya jata hai.

quiz.question: Sanyukt Rashtra (UN) ka mukhyalay kahan hai?
quiz.explanation: UN ka mukhyalay New York (USA) me hai.

title: ⚛️ Vigyanik aur Khoj (Scientists)
facts: Gurutvakarshan (Gravity) ke niyam: Isaac Newton.
E=mc² aur Relativity: Albert Einstein.
Bijli ka bulb: Thomas Edison.
Telephone: Alexander Graham Bell.
Radio: Guglielmo Marconi.

quiz.question: Gurutvakarshan (gravity) ke niyam kisne diye?
quiz.explanation: Isaac Newton ne gurutvakarshan ke niyam diye.

title: ❤️ Manav Hriday (Heart)
facts: Hriday (heart) me 4 kaksh (chambers) hote hain.
Upar ke do: Atria; neeche ke do: Ventricles.
Universal blood donor: O-negative group.
Universal recipient: AB group.
Khoon ko shuddh karne ka kaam fephde (lungs) karte hain.

quiz.question: Manav hriday (heart) me kitne kaksh (chambers) hote hain?
quiz.explanation: Hriday me 4 kaksh hote hain — 2 atria aur 2 ventricles.

title: 💰 Bharatiya Arthvyavastha (Economy)
facts: Bharat ke do bade share bazaar: BSE aur NSE — dono Mumbai me.
Share bazaar ka regulator: SEBI.
Aam Budget har saal 1 February ko pesh hota hai.
Bharat ka vittiya varsh (financial year): 1 April se 31 March.
GST (Goods and Services Tax) 1 July 2017 ko lagu hua.

quiz.question: Bharat ka share bazaar 'BSE' kis sheher me hai?
quiz.explanation: BSE (Bombay Stock Exchange) Mumbai me hai.

title: 🏆 Olympic Khel
facts: Olympic Games har 4 saal me ek baar hote hain.
Pehle aadhunik Olympics 1896 me Athens (Greece) me hue.
Olympic ka chinh: 5 chhalle (rings) — 5 mahadweep.
Olympic motto: 'Faster, Higher, Stronger'.
Neeraj Chopra ne 2020 (Tokyo) Olympics me javelin me gold jeeta.

quiz.question: Olympic Games kitne saal me ek baar hote hain?
quiz.explanation: Olympic Games har 4 saal me ek baar aayojit hote hain.

title: 🧊 Jheelein (Lakes of India)
facts: Wular Lake (J&K): Bharat ki sabse badi miththe paani (freshwater) ki jheel.
Chilika Lake (Odisha): sabse badi khare paani ki tatiya jheel (lagoon).
Dal Lake: Srinagar (Kashmir) ki mashhoor jheel.
Sambhar Lake (Rajasthan): sabse badi namak (salt) wali jheel.
Vembanad (Kerala): Bharat ki sabse lambi jheel.

quiz.question: Bharat ki sabse badi khare paani ki tatiya jheel (lagoon) kaun si hai?
quiz.explanation: Chilika (Odisha) Bharat ki sabse badi khare paani ki lagoon hai.

title: 📏 Bharat ki Seemayein (Borders)
facts: Bharat sabse lambi sthal-seema (land border) Bangladesh se baantta hai (~4096 km).
Bharat-China seema ko 'McMahon Line' kehte hain.
Bharat-Pakistan seema ko 'Radcliffe Line' kehte hain.
Bharat 7 deshon se seema baantta hai.
Sabse lambi tatrekha (coastline) wala rajya: Gujarat.

quiz.question: Bharat sabse lambi sthal-seema (land border) kis desh se baantta hai?
quiz.explanation: Bharat sabse lambi sthal-seema Bangladesh ke saath baantta hai.

title: 🇮🇳 Rashtrapita Mahatma Gandhi
facts: Mahatma Gandhi ka janm 2 October 1869 ko Porbandar (Gujarat) me hua.
Poora naam: Mohandas Karamchand Gandhi.
Inhe 'Rashtrapita' aur 'Bapu' kaha jata hai.
Inke siddhant: Satya (Truth) aur Ahimsa (Non-violence).
2 October 'Gandhi Jayanti' aur 'International Day of Non-Violence' hai.

quiz.question: Mahatma Gandhi ka janm kahan hua tha?
quiz.explanation: Mahatma Gandhi ka janm Porbandar (Gujarat) me hua tha.

title: 🌡️ Vigyan: Mapak Yantra (Instruments)
facts: Thermometer: taapmaan (temperature) maapta hai.
Barometer: vayumandaliya dabav (atmospheric pressure) maapta hai.
Seismograph: bhukamp (earthquake) ki tibrata maapta hai.
Speedometer: gaadi ki gati (speed) maapta hai.
Hygrometer: hava me nami (humidity) maapta hai.

quiz.question: Bhukamp (earthquake) ki tibrata kis yantra se maapi jaati hai?
quiz.explanation: Seismograph se bhukamp ki tibrata maapi jaati hai.

title: 🐯 Vanya Jeev (Wildlife)
facts: Project Tiger 1973 me shuru hua tha.
Asiatic Lion (Sher) sirf Gir (Gujarat) me paye jate hain.
Ek-sing wala gainda (Rhino) Kaziranga (Assam) me milta hai.
Bharat ka rashtriya jalchar (aquatic animal): Ganga Dolphin.
Jim Corbett Bharat ka pehla National Park hai (Uttarakhand).

quiz.question: Asiatic Lion (Sher) Bharat me kahan paye jate hain?
quiz.explanation: Asiatic Lion sirf Gir National Park (Gujarat) me paye jate hain.

title: 🪐 GK Quiz
facts: Budh (Mercury) saur mandal ka sabse chhota grah hai.

quiz.question: Saur mandal ka sabse chhota grah kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Budh (Mercury) sabse chhota grah hai.

title: 🔴 GK Quiz
facts: Mangal ko 'Laal Grah' kehte hain.

quiz.question: Kis grah ko 'Laal Grah' (Red Planet) kehte hain?
quiz.explanation: Mangal (Mars) ko Laal Grah kehte hain (iron oxide ki wajah se).

title: 🌡️ GK Quiz
facts: Shukra (Venus) sabse garam grah hai.

quiz.question: Saur mandal ka sabse garam grah?
quiz.explanation: Ghani CO2 vatavaran ke karan Shukra sabse garam hai.

facts: Liver (Yakrit) shareer ki sabse badi granthi hai.

quiz.question: Manav shareer ki sabse badi granthi (gland) kaun si hai?
quiz.explanation: Liver (Yakrit) sabse badi granthi hai.

facts: Insulin Pancreas (Agnashay) me banta hai.

quiz.question: Insulin manav shareer me kahan banta hai?
quiz.explanation: Insulin Pancreas (Agnashay) me banta hai.

quiz.explanation: Vyask manushya ke 32 daant hote hain.

facts: Paani 100°C par khaulta hai.

quiz.question: Saamanya dabav par paani kis taapmaan par khaulta (boil) hai?
quiz.explanation: Saamanya dabav par paani 100°C par khaulta hai.

quiz.question: Prakash (light) ki gati lagbhag kitni hoti hai?
quiz.explanation: Prakash ki gati lagbhag 3 lakh km/second hai.

facts: Sona (Gold) ka chinh Au hai.

quiz.question: Sona (Gold) ka rasayanik chinh kya hai?
quiz.explanation: Sone ka rasayanik chinh Au (Aurum) hai.

facts: Chandi (Silver) ka chinh Ag hai.

quiz.question: Chandi (Silver) ka rasayanik chinh kya hai?
quiz.explanation: Chandi ka chinh Ag (Argentum) hai.

facts: Hydrogen sabse halka tatva hai.

quiz.question: Sabse halka rasayanik tatva (element) kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Hydrogen sabse halka tatva hai.

facts: Hira (Diamond) carbon ka bana hota hai.

quiz.question: Hira (Diamond) kis tatva ka bana hota hai?
quiz.explanation: Hira shudh carbon ka roop hai.

quiz.explanation: 'Jana Gana Mana' Rabindranath Tagore ne likha.

quiz.question: 'Vande Mataram' geet kisne likha?
quiz.explanation: 'Vande Mataram' Bankim Chandra Chattopadhyay ne likha.

quiz.explanation: Mool Ramayan Maharishi Valmiki ne likhi.

facts: Mahabharat Ved Vyas ne likhi.

quiz.explanation: Mahabharat Maharishi Ved Vyas ne likhi.

facts: 'Wings of Fire' APJ Abdul Kalam ki atmakatha hai.

quiz.explanation: 'Wings of Fire' APJ Abdul Kalam ki atmakatha hai.

title: 🏃 GK Quiz
facts: Milkha Singh 'Flying Sikh' kehlate hain.

quiz.explanation: Milkha Singh ko 'Flying Sikh' kaha jata hai.

facts: Sachin Tendulkar 'Master Blaster' kehlate hain.

quiz.explanation: Sachin Tendulkar ko 'Master Blaster' kehte hain.

title: ♟️ GK Quiz
facts: Shatranj ke board me 64 khaane hote hain.

quiz.question: Shatranj (chess) ke board me kitne khaane (squares) hote hain?
quiz.explanation: Chess board me 64 khaane (8x8) hote hain.

title: 🏐 GK Quiz
facts: Cricket ke ek over me 6 gend hoti hain.

quiz.question: Cricket ke ek over me kitni gend (balls) hoti hain?
quiz.explanation: Ek over me 6 vaidh gend hoti hain.

title: ⚽ GK Quiz
facts: FIFA World Cup football ka hai.

quiz.question: FIFA World Cup kis khel ka aayojan hai?
quiz.explanation: FIFA World Cup football (soccer) ka tournament hai.

facts: Asia sabse bada mahadweep hai.

quiz.question: Duniya ka sabse bada mahadweep (continent) kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Asia kshetrafal aur aabaadi dono me sabse bada mahadweep hai.

facts: Australia sabse chhota mahadweep hai.

quiz.question: Duniya ka sabse chhota mahadweep kaun sa hai?
quiz.explanation: Australia sabse chhota mahadweep hai.

facts: Sahara sabse bada garam registan hai.

quiz.explanation: Sahara (Africa) sabse bada garam registan hai.

quiz.explanation: Russia kshetrafal me duniya ka sabse bada desh hai.

facts: Pakistan ki rajdhani Islamabad hai.

quiz.explanation: Pakistan ki rajdhani Islamabad hai.

title: 🏛️ GK Quiz
facts: Nepal ki rajdhani Kathmandu hai.

quiz.question: Nepal ki rajdhani kaun si hai?
